gallery.h2: Lawns we maintain in the area.

serviceOptions: Not Sure — I Need an Assessment

items.q: How often should my lawn be mowed?
items.a: During the growing season, most lawns need mowing weekly or every 7-10 days. We adjust frequency based on growth rate and your preferences.

items.q: Do you offer recurring maintenance plans?
items.a: Yes — most of our customers are on annual plans that include mowing, fertilization, weed control, and seasonal cleanups. Recurring plans save 10-15% over one-off pricing.

items.q: What's included in your fertilization program?
items.a: Our full-season program includes 4-6 applications covering spring green-up, summer stress feeding, fall strengthening, and pre-emergent weed prevention.

items.q: Are your products safe for kids and pets?
items.a: We use EPA-registered products and follow all label instructions. We'll notify you of any reentry intervals after treatments. We also offer organic programs on request.
Yes. Our applicators hold state pesticide applicator licenses and we carry full general liability and workers' compensation insurance.

cta.h2: Your neighbors have the best lawn on the street. You could too.
cta.subtext: Get a free quote today — no obligation, no pressure. We'll tell you exactly what your lawn needs.
